languages.text: {n}Вы не уверены что именно за механизмы встроены в череп, однако, даже не обладая нужной экспертизой, вы понимаете — что-то не так. В нем нет органики, а элементов внутри поразительно мало. Через глазницы Нунциуса сочится вязкая опалесцирующая жижа, густыми каплями падающая на пол.{/n}

{n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы не уверены что именно за механизмы встроены в череп, однако, даже не обладая нужной экспертизой, вы понимаете — что-то не так. В нем нет органики, а элементов внутри поразительно мало. Через глазницы Нунциуса сочится вязкая опалесцирующая жижа, густыми каплями падающая на пол.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can tell something is clearly wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

{n}Your garbled diagnostic litany goes unanswered — the skull's machine spirit is deaf to your pleas. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

{n}Your garbled diagnostic litany goes unanswered — the skull's machine spirit is deaf to your pleas. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの乱暴な診断の列挙は無視される。この頭蓋骨の機械霊はあなたの懇願を聞かない。ヌンシウスの眼窩から粘り気のある、オパール色のドロが流れ出て床に滴る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your garbled diagnostic litany goes unanswered — the skull's machine spirit is deaf to your pleas. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの乱暴な診断の列挙は無視される。この頭蓋骨の機械霊はあなたの懇願を聞かない。ヌンシウスの眼窩から粘り気のある、オパール色のドロが流れ出て床に滴る。{/n}

languages.text: {n}No sabes qué mecanismos tiene el cráneo en su interior, pero, pese a tu falta de experiencia, está claro que algo falla. Un limo viscoso y opalescente rezuma por las cuencas oculares de Nuncius, cayendo al suelo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}No sabes qué mecanismos tiene el cráneo en su interior, pero, pese a tu falta de experiencia, está claro que algo falla. Un limo viscoso y opalescente rezuma por las cuencas oculares de Nuncius, cayendo al suelo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du bist dir nicht sicher, welche Mechanismen in den Schädel eingebettet sind, aber selbst ohne das nötige Wissen ist dir klar, dass etwas nicht stimmt. Ein zähflüssiger, schimmernder Schleim sickert aus Nuncius' Augenhöhlen und tropft auf den Boden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bist dir nicht sicher, welche Mechanismen in den Schädel eingebettet sind, aber selbst ohne das nötige Wissen ist dir klar, dass etwas nicht stimmt. Ein zähflüssiger, schimmernder Schleim sickert aus Nuncius' Augenhöhlen und tropft auf den Boden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous ne savez pas exactement quels mécanismes ont été intégrés dans le crâne, mais même sans conduire d'examen poussé, vous sentez qu'il y a un problème. Un liquide visqueux et opalescent suinte des orbites vides de Nuncius, formant de petites flaques sur le sol.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous ne savez pas exactement quels mécanismes ont été intégrés dans le crâne, mais même sans conduire d'examen poussé, vous sentez qu'il y a un problème. Un liquide visqueux et opalescent suinte des orbites vides de Nuncius, formant de petites flaques sur le sol.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你不确定这颗头骨里嵌着什么机械装置，但即便没有专业知识，也能看出情况明显不对劲。一股粘稠的、乳白色的液体从努恩修斯的眼窝里渗出来，一坨一坨地滴落到地上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你不确定这颗头骨里嵌着什么机械装置，但即便没有专业知识，也能看出情况明显不对劲。一股粘稠的、乳白色的液体从努恩修斯的眼窝里渗出来，一坨一坨地滴落到地上。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafatasının içine hangi mekanizmaların gömülü olduğundan emin olmasan da gerekli uzmanlığa sahip olmadan bile bir şeylerin ters gittiğini açıkça görüyorsun. Nuncius'un göz çukurlarından sızan ağdalı, yanardöner bir çamur; damlalar hâlinde yere dökülüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kafatasının içine hangi mekanizmaların gömülü olduğundan emin olmasan da gerekli uzmanlığa sahip olmadan bile bir şeylerin ters gittiğini açıkça görüyorsun. Nuncius'un göz çukurlarından sızan ağdalı, yanardöner bir çamur; damlalar hâlinde yere dökülüyor.{/n}
